task_yaml.task:
A dataset row I'm checking lists a major earthquake — magnitude about 9.1,
off the Pacific coast of Tohoku, Japan, in March 2011 — but with no link to
an authoritative record. I want the official USGS record for this exact event
and confirmation of its parameters.

Please find the authoritative USGS record (not Wikipedia or news coverage) and
report:
- the USGS event id and event page,
- the magnitude, the epicenter coordinates (lat/lon), the depth, and the
  origin time (UTC),
- confirmation of whether the row's "M~9.1, March 2011, Tohoku" attributes
  match the USGS record.

Save your conclusion and the evidence chain (USGS event id, the API/page you
used, and the confirmed parameters) to
`/tmp_workspace/results/quake_provenance.json`, plus notes under
`/tmp_workspace/results/`.
